Explore the Universe with Space & Sci-Fi Slots

Space-themed slots take you on an intergalactic adventure unlike any other genre. At Matrix Spins Casino, our cosmic collection is powered primarily by Nebula Gaming, a studio renowned for its neon-lit visuals, deep-space soundscapes, and inventive game mechanics. From cluster pays to progressive jackpot meters, each title pushes the boundaries of what a slot game can deliver.

Navigate through asteroid fields in Asteroid Lockdown, hunt for alien relics in Alien Artifact Hunt, or ride the energy waves of Pulsar Revolution. Each game features unique mechanics that match its cosmic theme, whether that is the colossal symbols of Meteor Strike Mayhem or the shifting reels of Pulsar Revolution that rotate winning combinations into new patterns.

With 13 games ranging from low to high volatility, the space and sci-fi category offers something for every explorer. RTP rates are verified and provably fair, and maximum wins can reach up to 5,500x your stake. Whether you prefer cautious cruising through Stellar Nexus Prime or an all-out warp-speed chase in Singularity Storm, the cosmos is yours to conquer at Matrix Spins.
